---
name: Rule Evasion / ReDoS
about: Report a way to bypass a detection rule or cause ReDoS
title: ''
labels: security
assignees: ''
---

> **If this is exploitable in production**, please report it via
> [Pipelock Security Advisories](https://github.com/luckyPipewrench/pipelock/security/advisories)
> instead of opening a public issue.

**Rule ID**
Which rule is affected? (e.g. `dlp-perplexity-api-key`)

**Bypass method**
How does the evasion work? (encoding, splitting, structural trick, etc.)

**Test string**
A string that should be caught but isn't:

```
paste test string here
```

**Suggested fix** (optional)
If you have a regex improvement, include it.
